name: roll_dice
description: Roll one or more dice and return the individual results and their sum. Use for random rolls, e.g. 'roll 2 twenty-sided dice'.

sides.description: Number of sides per die (2-1000). Default 6.

count.description: How many dice to roll (1-100). Default 1.

returns: The individual rolls and their total.
notes: Reference example demonstrating the ToolVault v2 module pattern (schema.json + executor.py). See ToolVault/tools/ADDING_A_TOOL.md.
